command:
ssh -i /home/jose/.ssh/n8n_bridge -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no jose@192.168.0.202 "cat > /tmp/fix_hermes_env.sh << 'SHEOF'
#!/bin/bash

# Fix stale values in .env
sed -i 's|OLLAMA_BASE_URL=http://192.168.0.203:11434/v1|OLLAMA_BASE_URL=http://192.168.0.39:11434/v1|' /home/jose/.hermes/.env
sed -i 's|HERMES_MODEL=ollama/llama3.1:8b|HERMES_MODEL=ollama/qwen3.5:9b|' /home/jose/.hermes/.env
echo env_fixed

# Add EnvironmentFile to the service so it loads .env
sudo sed -i '/^Environment="HERMES_HOME=/a EnvironmentFile=/home/jose/.hermes/.env' /etc/systemd/system/hermes-gateway.service
echo service_updated

# Reload and restart
sudo systemctl daemon-reload
sudo systemctl restart hermes-gateway
sleep 10

# Check logs for telegram
journalctl -u hermes-gateway -n 20 --no-pager 2>/dev/null | tail -15
SHEOF
bash /tmp/fix_hermes_env.sh"
